rows.name: Ask Julius about the Earthlife Colonization Project.

rows.label: tev022801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev022801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Julius if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev022801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Julius if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev022801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Julius about his experience with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev022801_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Julius about the Earthlife Colonization Project.

rows.label: tev022801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Julius about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Julius about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0001
rows.name:
As part of the Earthlife Colonization
Project, interstellar ships took
off from a number of cities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0002
rows.name:
However, we don't have any idea
what happened to the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0003
rows.name:
We've been transmitting a signal from
Mira in an attempt to establish contact,
but we haven't had any replies yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's possible that we're all that's
left of humanity. ...No. Ignore
that. We mustn't lose hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0008
rows.name:
The expansion of FrontierNet hasn't
been progressing the way I'd hoped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's mainly because of interference from
the indigens... though I suppose we ARE
the ones encroaching on their turf.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's only natural they'd
fight to protect it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0011
rows.name:
I just wish we could find a way to
install the data probes without having
to do so much needless fighting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0027
rows.name:
I've been reviewing the information sent over
from the data probes in Nightglow Forest, and
there's something that caught my eye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0028
rows.name:
Unfortunately, we don't have enough data
for me to understand what it means.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0029
rows.name:
We simply haven't installed
enough probes yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I need to find out more, so I hope
FrontierNet's presence in Nightglow
Forest will be expanded soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0035
rows.name:
I had an opportunity to discuss
life in NLA with the Ma-non, and
they told me something...strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0036
rows.name:
They said the space around
this planet is small.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0037
rows.name:
Muh? How can space be small?
What does that even mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0045
rows.name:
The bodies we thought were waiting for us
never existed at all—this is the truth
behind the Earthlife Colonization Project.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0046
rows.name:
The knowledge that Elma shared
with us led to dramatic
advances in our technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0047
rows.name:
Even just a few decades ago,
emigrating from Earth the way we
did would have been impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG0048
rows.name:
If it weren't for her, humanity might
have been wiped out a long time ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG1001
rows.name:
The Orphe are far too logical for war.
They apparently renounced it eons ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG1002
rows.name:
Now when faced with an outside
enemy, they only think of how
best to run and hide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG1003
rows.name:
That must be why they weren't able to
resist the Growth when they attacked.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG1004
rows.name:
They may possess the technology to make weapons,
but there are no Orpheans who can wield them. It's
a difficult situation for us humans to fathom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG2035
rows.name:
The "Ovah" that the Orphe
revere is actually a virus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG2036
rows.name:
However, Orpheans are able
to sense something like
consciousness from this virus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG2037
rows.name:
It's an enigma to us, but it
may in truth be an entirely
new form of intelligent life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG2038
rows.name:
Unfortunately, since the Ovah is so
important to the Orphe, they may be
reluctant to allow us to study it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022801_MSG2039
rows.name:
But I would still like to pursue a
thorough examination. After all,
we'll be living with it here in NLA![ST:wait ]
